name: Frances Payne Bolton School of Nursing
strategic_fit_advice: For committed pre-nursing students seeking intensive, early clinical exposure.

majors.name: Nursing
majors.special_requirements: Requires a four-year commitment due to intensive clinical hour requirements.
majors.notes: The only major at CWRU that does not fall strictly under the fluid 'single-door' policy. Switching into nursing after matriculation essentially requires starting over as a freshman.
